creator-facing Studio download and Create restore controls

verification.production_build: passed; Next.js generated 56 static pages and included both portability routes
verification.browser_smoke: Authenticated Create loaded against the scratch PostgreSQL database; Space, source and recipe requests returned 200 and the creator workspace rendered. Archive UI semantics are locked by the contract test.

responses are authenticated, rate limited, private no-store and nosniff
same archive digest cannot be replayed into one destination Space

marketplace moderation, payout and extension isolation gates
